SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-11-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XUN SU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DEBORAH MANN IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2414.66 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUNE 11TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
